metadata.name: Clough-Stevenson-Style Controlled Corpus
metadata.description: Controlled original-vs-plagiarized code pairs with exact copies, identifier renaming, statement reordering, semantic rewrites, cross-language translation, obfuscation, and hard negatives for PAN-style benchmark scoring.

split_protocol.rule: Engine weights tune on train, design choices compare on validation, final reported metrics use locked test only.

inter_rater_agreement.note: Two independent reviewers plus third-person adjudication are required before this fixture is used for final published claims.

external_validation.note: Use PAN published corpora for external validity and published-baseline comparison before procurement or publication claims.

name: clough_stevenson_style
description: Controlled plagiarism benchmark inspired by Clough & Stevenson corpus design: originals, disguised variants, semantic rewrites, cross-language translation, obfuscation, and hard negatives with explicit labels.
